channel.title: NEONCPS | CPS Test and Guide Updates
channel.description: Updates for the NEONCPS CPS test, guide library, methodology notes, and site standards.

item.title: NEONCPS | CPS Click Speed Test and Guide
item.description: Main CPS test page with updated resource-library links, methodology notes, and review date.

item.title: NEONCPS Guides | CPS Methodology, Interpretation, and Safety
item.description: New guide library covering methodology, score variance, mobile versus mouse comparison, and safer practice.

item.title: How NEONCPS Measures CPS
item.description: Explanation of the input rule, timing rule, and interpretation limits behind the NEONCPS score.

item.title: Why CPS Scores Change Between Attempts
item.description: Guide explaining fatigue, timing boundaries, device conditions, and fair repeatability rules.

item.title: Safe CPS Practice and Improvement
item.description: Short-session practice advice focused on repeatability, rest, and avoiding unnecessary strain.
